name: File Helper
description: Local-first file utilities for Switchbay. Safe, predictable file reads, directory listings, in-file search, and guarded find-and-replace — all sandboxed to a workspace root.

tools.name: list_directory
tools.description: List the contents of a directory. Returns name, path, is_dir, and size_bytes for each entry.

path.description: Relative or absolute path to list. Defaults to '.'.

root.description: Optional workspace root to sandbox paths within. Prevents escaping the root.

recursive.description: Whether to list all nested files recursively. Defaults to false.

tools.name: read_file
tools.description: Read a file as text. Enforces a max size guard (default 200 KB).

path.description: Path to the file to read.

root.description: Optional workspace root to sandbox the path within.

max_bytes.description: Maximum file size in bytes to read. Defaults to 200000.

tools.name: search_in_file
tools.description: Search for a string or regex pattern in a file and return matching lines with surrounding context.

path.description: Path to the file to search.

query.description: The search string or regex pattern.

root.description: Optional workspace root to sandbox the path within.

regex.description: Whether to treat query as a regex pattern. Defaults to false.

context_lines.description: Number of lines of context to include around each match. Defaults to 2.

max_results.description: Maximum number of results to return. Defaults to 50.

tools.name: replace_in_file
tools.description: Find and replace text inside a file in-place. WARNING: mutates the file.

path.description: Path to the file to modify.

search.description: The text or regex pattern to find.

root.description: Optional workspace root to sandbox the path within.

regex.description: Whether to treat search as a regex pattern. Defaults to false.

count.description: Number of occurrences to replace. 0 means replace all. Defaults to 0.
